title: Setup Wizard + PDF Viewer Fix
items: New Setup Guide page (🚀 in sidebar): Typeform-style onboarding wizard walks new users through profile, account, CSV import, bills, goals, AI key, and notifications
10-step wizard with progress bar, dot indicators, slide animations, skip/back navigation, and inline confirmation after each step
First-time users (no accounts) are automatically directed to the wizard on login
PDF viewer: 'View PDF' now fetches the file with auth and opens via a Blob URL — fixes Brave/Chrome popup blocking and shield issues

title: Merchant Logos + Sticky Settings + Mortgage Interest
items: Merchants page now shows merchant logos (Google favicon service) and clean names from enrichment data
Settings page: Save Settings button pinned to sticky header — always visible while scrolling
New 'Mortgage Interest' category added (neutral grey, not tax-relevant for owner-occupied homes)

title: Budget Drill-Down + Bill Date Prediction
items: Budget drill-down: click any budget row (dashboard or Budgets page) to see all transactions contributing to that budget
Budget modal shows category, progress bar, transaction list with merchant logos, and a 'View in Transactions' jump link
Bills: 'Predict Due Dates' button auto-detects next due dates from transaction history with a confidence score
Predicted dates shown inline — apply individually or all at once
Confidence badges: green ≥80%, amber ≥50%

title: Investment Grouping + UI Polish + CSV Fixes
items: Investments page groups holdings by ticker — one row per stock with total qty, weighted avg cost, and combined gain/loss
Click the › chevron to expand a ticker and see individual purchase lots (fixed Alpine.js reactivity issue)
Dashboard NW/Portfolio sparkline hover now shows date label even with a single snapshot
Sidebar scrollbar styled to match dark theme (thin, semi-transparent)
CSV import now skips bank preamble rows (fixes St George Credit Card import errors)
Budget Progress card shows only active categories, sorted by urgency (highest % used first)

title: Chat History + Interactive RBA Chart
items: Chat History page: every AI conversation is saved and accessible from the More menu or the History button in the chat panel
Search conversations by title or content, click to reopen and continue any past chat
New Chat button in chat panel header starts a fresh conversation without clearing history
RBA cash rate sparkline is now interactive — hover or swipe across the chart to see the exact date and rate at each point
Chat conversations are linked to individual users and persist across sessions

title: Work Reimbursable Expenses
items: Mark any expense as 💼 reimbursable — excluded from personal spend, budgets, and trend calculations
Three-state cycle: not reimbursable → ⏳ Pending → ✓ Received (click 💼 on any row)
Tax page: Work Reimbursables card showing pending total (awaiting payment back) vs received, with per-transaction list and Mark Received button
Budget vs-spend, dashboard totals, and 6-month trend all exclude reimbursable expenses
Tax note: once reimbursed, the expense is not your cost and should not be claimed as a deduction

title: Zeus Jnr Dog + Sparkline Date Labels
items: Finance Pet redesigned as Zeus Jnr — black & white dog with floppy ears, body patches, blue collar, gold ZJ dog tag
Pet moods now expressed through dog-specific features: tail position (up/horizontal/drooping), tongue on happy, dark spots on head and body
Level labels updated to dog theme: Pup Zeus Jnr → Zeus Jnr → Good Boy → Champion
Dashboard stat tiles now show a clean white line sparkline (no coloured fill/dots) with date labels at bottom corners
sparklineLineSvg() helper: crisp white line, date range text (first → last month) inside the card
sparklineSvg() now handles single data point (dashed horizontal line) so NW and portfolio cards show something with only one snapshot

title: Finance Pet (Tamagotchi) + Sparkline Expansion
items: Finance Pet page: animated SVG character (Biscuit) driven by your finance score
Pet moods: happy/neutral/worried/sick/sleeping — each with unique animations + expressions
4 interaction buttons: Feed (savings goals), Exercise (SortSwipe), Bath (budgets), Treat (earned at 80%+ health)
Level 1–4 evolution based on finance score; crown at Level 4
Pet stats: Health (budget adherence), Fullness (savings rate), Happiness (finance score)
Activity log in localStorage; rename pet and save to settings
Sparklines on dashboard stat tiles: Month Spend, Month Income, Net (using 6-month trend)
Super balance card sparkline (balance history over time)
RBA sparkline improved: featured mode with full opacity, all dots labelled with date+rate tooltip
sparklineSvgFeatured() helper for standalone chart panels vs faint background version

title: Sparklines + Merchant Logos + Draggable Chat
items: All value cards now show a faint background sparkline (net worth, portfolio, crypto, investments, RBA cash rate)
Top Transactions card shows merchant logos and clean names from enrichment
Fixed RBA sparkline rendering (Alpine <template x-if> SVG namespace bug)
Net worth page stats card gets sparkline background
Chat FAB button is now draggable — tap to open, drag to reposition, position saved to localStorage

title: Key Insights Card + Gauge Fixes
items: Dashboard: Key Insights card between stat tiles and quick actions
Insights: spending pace alert, MoM trend, bills due this week, uncategorised count, finance score, flagged items
Insights: colour-coded left border (red/amber/green/blue) per severity
Fixed Fear/Greed needle not rendering (Alpine <template x-if> SVG namespace bug)
Fixed CPI gauge needle invisible (:style string was replacing full inline style)

title: Market Pulse Enhancements
items: Fixed app data loss bug — start.sh now always connects to correct database
Market Pulse: RBA rate history sparkline + last change date and basis points
Market Pulse: CPI/inflation gauge with RBA 2–3% target band visualisation
Market Pulse: Fear & Greed meter (CNN index) with semicircle SVG gauge
Market Pulse: Australian Finance news tab (SMH Business + ABC News + RBA Speeches)
Market Pulse: AI briefing now works (API key lookup fixed)
Market Pulse: News section split into Your Holdings tab and AU Finance tab

title: Mobile Budget Fix + Changelog Automation
items: Budget page now stacks vertically on mobile (table + chart panel)
All budget columns now visible on mobile with horizontal scroll (ABS/wk, Last Month, Last 7d)
Changelog moved to changelog.json — auto-updated each session, no manual prompting needed
Personal data audit: all hardcoded names/locations/device IDs removed from public addon repo

title: Chatbot + Budgets + ABS Weekly
items: Chatbot system prompt: always uses tools, never claims data unavailable
get_categories tool added to chatbot
Chat history persistence across page refreshes
21 March 2026 budgets created from 3-month spending averages
Budget/wk column on budget table (monthly ÷ 4.33)
ABS data now age-group-specific (all 6 groups)
Comparison Data Sources card + Changelog in Settings
ABS check-for-updates button (live ABS website fetch)

title: Price Refresh + Historical FX + Subscription Alerts + FY Export + Goal Types
items: Investment prices auto-refresh on load if >24h stale
Historical AUD/USD rate at purchase date (Yahoo Finance)
Subscription price change alerts on Bills page (±5% threshold)
Tax FY Summary card with 8 stat tiles
Short-term / long-term goal types with tabs
Duplicate iOS header fix (merged into single header)
App autocomplete for description, bill name, ticker/name fields

title: Payslip Fix + Search + Reports + PWA + Recurring
items: Payslip PDF view: pre-generated tokens fix Brave browser block
Transaction advanced filters (account, credit/debit, date range, amount)
Custom date range Reports page (income/spend, category bars, top merchants)
PWA install prompt for home screen
Full JSON data export/import
Recurring detection: confidence score, confirm/dismiss patterns
Multi-user support (separate data per user); SuperContribution user_id fix

title: Budget Alerts + Net Worth Forecast
items: Budget push alerts at configurable threshold (default 80%), deduplicated per month
Net Worth Forecast: 1/3/5/10 year projection with editable return rate

title: Merchant Enrichment + ZBB
items: Merchant name enrichment via Claude Haiku batch (clean names + logos)
Newsletter: Google Favicon logos in top expenses
Zero-Based Budgeting panel on Budget page with Auto-Fill from history

title: Demo Mode + Sankey + SortSwipe
items: Demo mode: masks all personal data with deterministic fake values
Sankey diagram toggle on Dashboard spend chart (pure SVG)
SortSwipe page: Tinder-style card UI for categorise / tax flag / receipts

title: Integrations + Receipts + Audit
items: Folder watcher: auto-import CSVs from watch directory every 30s
Receipt attachment: upload/serve/delete per transaction
Stake auto-sync (NYSE + ASX, AUD conversion)
Audit export: ZIP of deductible CSV + receipts + README
Gmail receipt correlation: matches emails to transactions by amount/date/merchant

title: Weekly Newsletter
items: HTML email newsletter via Gmail SMTP: week/MTD summary, AI insights, action items
4 roadmap items + 3 feature suggestions with chatbot deep-links
Newsletter settings card (recipient, app URL, Send Now, Preview Data)

title: AI Chat Assistant
items: Floating chat widget with Claude Haiku (tool-use loop)
8 tools: dashboard, budget, goals, score, investments, net worth, tax, run_sql
Suggested question chips, typing indicator, conversation history

title: Goals + Gamification + Streaks
items: Savings goals (CRUD, contributions, HA notify on completion)
Finance Score 0–100 (savings rate, budget adherence, categorisation, bills)
8 achievement badges, streak tracking (green months + under-budget)
Monthly challenges (spend limit or save target)
Full Goals page with score breakdown, achievements grid, challenges

title: CGT + Dividends
items: Acquisition lots (cost base), disposal recording, 50% CGT discount
Dividend tracking with franking credit auto-calculation
CGT + dividend summary cards on Tax page
Lots + dividends tables on Investments page

title: Super + ABS + Sparklines
items: Superannuation tracker: balance history, ASFA retirement progress, projections
ABS badges on Budget page (weekly median by category)
Bulk payslip upload
Dashboard sparklines + trend arrows for Net Worth and Portfolio

title: Dashboard + Profile + Tax
items: Dashboard drill-down stat cards + Net Worth/Portfolio widgets
Personal profile + ABS benchmarks (age/gender/state percentile bars on Insights)
Income tax estimator (payslip YTD → ATO brackets, LITO, Medicare, HELP)
Payslip AI upload (PDF → structured data, variation flags)
Gmail scanner (expense emails preview + import)

title: Investments
items: Binance sync (HMAC-signed, AUD conversion)
Share holdings + Yahoo Finance prices (ASX + US)
Net Worth tracker (snapshots, chart)
Investment Transfer category (auto-detected on CSV import)

title: Notifications + Bills
items: HA push notifications (bills/budget/flagged/monthly alerts)
Bill payment history, Pay modal, annual cost
Recurring transaction detector
Year-over-year spend trend toggle on Dashboard

title: Foundation
items: CSV import (Macquarie format), AI categorisation (Claude Haiku)
Manual transaction entry, bulk edit, export to CSV
Merchant analytics page
Dashboard with income/spend/savings summary, category chart
